title: Ruby Beach Sunset
subTitle: Relax for a full hour as a golden, soothing sunset slowly unfolds and turns to dusk as seen from Ruby Beach, on Washington state's Olympic Peninsula; you'll be lulled into a state of tranquil relaxation thanks to the sounds of rhythmic ocean waves gently crashing over the pebbly beach paired with the dazzling collage of four different sunset scenes shot in 4K.

title: Wonders of New Zealand
subTitle: A 4K UHD ambient nature film which showcases the beauty of New Zealand's South Island with ambient real-life nature sounds.

title: Golden Waves Crashing at Sunset
subTitle: The shores of the iconic Baker Beach in San Francisco with a sunset scene filmed in high definition. Views of the Marin headlands and the Golden Gate bridge.

subTitle: A look at the dazzling fish that inhabit the marine landscapes of the Tropical Pacific; exploring their daily lives as they forage and school in the depths of the ocean.

subTitle: The filmmaker showcases South Korea's natural wonders and urban landscapes by exploring the four of the country's most famous destinations: Jeju Island, Seoul, Geoje National Park and Busan.
